title: An American Tragedy
author: Theodore Dreiser
description: In "An American Tragedy," Theodore Dreiser weaves a compelling narrative that delves deeply into the themes of aspiration, morality, and the harsh realities of the American Dream. The novel follows the plight of Clyde Griffiths, a young man torn between his desires for wealth and status and the moral dilemmas they engender.
